settings.name: Need an unlocking cutscene (FOR_EACH_PLAYER) for door unlock
These TeleportGrounds cannot be INTER_AREA because that causes the music to reset
Note: If player enters this map before mba-lobby or path-7-1, the building name in the prop hoverText will be blank

message.en_US: Have you guys completed the dungeon yet? I can't enter until my friend shows up.
Did you leave your friend inside the dungeon? Luckily you only have to open the front door once.
Your friend ran off too, huh? The dungeon won't open without two players to press both switches.
Looks like we are both stuck out here until our friends stop messing around doing who knows what.
Oh, the dungeon is open for you. Did you enter with a partner earlier?
It's still locked for me until my friend shows up. I'm not sure what's taking him so long.
You're missing a partner to enter the dungeon too, huh?
Same here...\. I am waiting for my friend to show up. He sure is taking his sweet time!
They keep adding all this fancy new stuff like co-op dungeons...
But they can't bring back fishing?!
